evals.prompt: Add a CSV upload area where users can upload a sales report CSV file and see the data rendered in a table. Show the column headers and all rows.
evals.expected_output: A file input that parses the uploaded CSV and renders the result in a table. Uses the project's CSV parsing utility.
expectations: Uses the project's CSV parsing approach (Papa Parse or equivalent from available packages)
Renders parsed data as a table with headers from the first row
Handles the async file reading correctly
Shows a loading or empty state before a file is uploaded

evals.prompt: Let users upload any file — a PDF, Word doc, Excel spreadsheet, or image — and show a preview of the file inline on the page.
evals.expected_output: A file input that passes the uploaded file to the project's file preview component, rendering an inline preview.
expectations: Uses the project's file preview component from @/components/ui/
Handles multiple file types (PDF, images, office docs)
Does not try to manually render PDFs with raw canvas or iframe from scratch
Passes the file or URL to the preview component correctly
